CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value INT);
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INT, test_id INT, attribute VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE large_table (id INT, value INT);
INSERT INTO large_table (id, value) SELECT generate_series(1, 1000), random() * 1000;
CREATE TABLE complex_table (id INT, main_value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO complex_table SELECT id, id * 1.5 FROM generate_series(1, 500) AS id;
CREATE TABLE mixed_table (id INT, numeric_value DOUBLE PRECISION, text_value TEXT);
SELECT value FROM mixed_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM mixed_table WHERE numeric_value > 2.0);
CREATE TABLE join_table1 (id INT, join_value INT);
CREATE TABLE join_table2 (join_id INT, description TEXT);
